title: Activate
description: Uses the connected Google Calendar to scan booked and free slots, brief before the call, and analyze it after.

account.stats: {meetings, plural, =0 {No meetings} one {# meeting} other {# meetings}} · {slots, plural, =0 {no free slots} one {# free slot} other {# free slots}}

slots.title: Pick a slot
slots.comingSoonBody: Picking a free slot and booking it directly into your Google Calendar isn't wired up yet. For now, the calendar is read-only — manage bookings in Google Calendar.

upcoming.title: Upcoming meetings
upcoming.emptyBody: Synced meetings from your connected Google Calendar will appear here.

research.comingSoonBody: Generating an AI pre-meeting brief from a company name isn't wired to a backend yet. It will summarize the prospect, recent news, and talking points before your call.

after.comingSoonBody: Read-AI-style call summaries — key moments, sentiment, and next steps from a recorded call — aren't wired to a backend on this page yet.
